query: project details of stock watchlist assistant
response:
**Project Details** | Item | Information | |------|--------------| | **Title** | Stock Watchlist Assistant with Explainable Signal Fusion for Retail Investors | | **Subject** | AI in Fintech | | **Programme** | MTech AI/ML | | **Institution** | Symbiosis Institute of Technology, Pune | | **Academic Year** | 2025‑26 | | **Student** | Taher Poonawala (Roll No. 25070149025) | | **Supervisor** | Dr. Anupkumar M Bongale | | **GitHub Repository** | https://github.com/tp-0604/stock-watchlist | | **FinBERT Model** | huggingface.co/tahp0604/finbert-sentfin | | **Key Components** | | • **Web Application** (Flask) – `webapp/app.py` with HTML templates (`index.html`, `history.html`) and static JS/CSS (`app.js`, `style.css`). | | • **Core Backend** – `src/` contains configuration, data models, pipeline orchestrator, SQLite DB, price and news fetchers. | | • **Signals** – Technical indicator scoring (`signals/technical_signals.py`) and sentiment analysis using fine‑tuned FinBERT (`signals/sentiment_analyzer.py`). | | • **Fusion Engine** – Explainable Signal Fusion (ESF) with weighted fusion and conflict detection (`fusion/signal_fusion.py`). | | • **LLM Integration** – Groq calls (in `llm/`). | | **Architecture Overview** | | • Two independent data flows per ticker:
  • **Daily Digest** – full pipeline (price, news, FinBERT, ESF, LLM) executed once per day, result cached in browser localStorage.
  • **Live Block** – lightweight price/technical update every 30 seconds via `/api/quickprice/` (no LLM, no news). | | **Project Structure** (high‑level) | | `stock_watchlist/`
  • `webapp/` (Flask routes, templates, static assets)
  • `src/` (ui config, models, pipeline, DB)
  • `data/` (price and news fetchers)
  • `signals/` (technical & sentiment modules)
  • `fusion/` (signal fusion)
  • `llm/` (LLM integration) |
